title: Ant King: 2015–2025
description:
What if you could go back 10 years — could you get rich in the stock market?

The year is 2015. All you're given is some seed money and a newspaper. Over the next 10 years, you get exactly one investment decision per year. If you knew back then what the headlines were saying — could you rise to become the Ant King?

Ant King is a 10-year investing challenge rebuilt from real stock movements and the actual news of each era. Read the paper every year, pick the stocks that will rise, buy and sell, and see your final rank after a decade. The rules are simple — but the market will test you.

Key Features

• 10 years, one choice — A simple, addictive loop: grow your assets with just one investment per year on your way to becoming the Ant King

• Real data, real news — Stocks and headlines built from actual price trends and the events of each year (split-adjusted)

• 3 markets to conquer — 🇰🇷 Korea · 🇺🇸 USA · 🇯🇵 Japan, each with its own flow and market leaders

• What's your rank? — Ant grades and achievements based on your 10-year performance, plus the reveal of each stock's true identity

• Endless Mode — A challenge that continues beyond the 10 years

• Korean / English support — one run takes just a few minutes

You may know the past — but the future is still your call.
description_short: Go back 10 years — could you get rich? 2015→2025, ten real years of stocks. Each year, read the news, invest once, and see your gains a year later. COVID, the AI boom, meme-stock mania — real events swing your returns. 5-minute runs, multiple endings. Korea & US markets, in KO/EN.
